mnemonics.title: Mnemonic 2
mnemonics.content: Expected Values Yield Outstanding Numerical Insights Constantly

mnemonics.title: Key Point 1
mnemonics.content: The mathematical expectation of a random variable is a measure of its central tendency

mnemonics.title: Key Point 2
mnemonics.content: It is calculated as the sum of each possible outcome multiplied by its probability

mnemonics.title: Key Point 3
mnemonics.content: Mathematical expectation is used to make informed decisions under uncertainty in computer science applications
